nasb.text: But on the first day of the week, at early dawn, they came to the tomb bringing the spices which they had prepared.

esv.text: But on the first day of the week, at early dawn, they went to the tomb, taking the spices they had prepared.

cnv.text: 禮拜日大清早的時候，婦女們帶著預備好的香料，來到墳墓那裡，

ccb.text: 周日黎明时分，几位妇女带着预备好的香料来到坟前，

csbs.text: 在一周的头一天，一大清早，妇女们带着预备好的香料来到墓穴那里，
